1_executive_summary.objective: Add early dimension mismatch detection to SQLiteVectorStore.initialize()
1_executive_summary.approach: Compare expected dimension (from config) with stored dimension (from file) during initialization
1_executive_summary.success_criteria: Clear error with remediation steps before expensive analysis work begins

mitigation_strategies: Manual testing with provider switch scenario

3_current_state_analysis.problem: Dimension validation happens during upsert(), wasting compute on analysis/embedding before failing
3_current_state_analysis.root_cause: SQLiteVectorStore.initialize() loads file without comparing stored dimension to expected dimension
3_current_state_analysis.evidence: sqlite-store.ts:166-168 loads data without validation; error thrown at line 224

tasks.title: Add dimension check in initialize() method
tasks.description: After loading existing data, compare this.data.dimension with this.config.dimension. If mismatch, throw VectorStoreError with clear message and remediation steps.

tasks.title: Test dimension mismatch detection
tasks.description: Manual test: create index with OpenAI (1536), switch to Ollama (768), verify early error with clear message and --reset suggestion.

hard_stop_gate.description: Validation must work correctly before proceeding to commit
checklist: Error thrown during initialize(), not upsert()

7_testing_strategy.unit_tests: Not required - validation is simple comparison
7_testing_strategy.integration_tests: Manual test with OpenAI->Ollama provider switch

8_success_criteria.functional: Early error detection before file analysis
8_success_criteria.performance: No performance impact - single comparison during init

9_implementation_checklist: EDIT add dimension comparison after loading file
